summary: Vehicle Document Upload & New Fields Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Tested plate_number, chassis_number, color fields and document upload/download/delete functionality.

PUT /api/admin/vehicles/{id} with new fi.details: plate_number, chassis_number, color fields all accept and persist correctly

POST /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/documents.details: Document upload works for all doc types: carte_grise, assurance, controle_technique, photo, autre

GET /api/vehicles/{id}/documents/{doc_id.details: Returns file content with correct Content-Type header

DELETE /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/document.details: Soft deletes document (is_deleted=true), download returns 404 after delete

GET /api/vehicles.details: Returns vehicles with plate_number, chassis_number, color, documents fields

Frontend: Vehicles grid with badges.details: Shows plate number badges on cards, doc count badges (blue) when documents exist, status badges

Frontend: Edit modal Identification sect.details: Shows Plaque d'immatriculation, Couleur, Numero de chassis fields with proper labels

Frontend: Edit modal Documents section.details: Doc type selector chips (Carte Grise, Assurance, etc.) and 'Ajouter un document' upload button present

Frontend: Save vehicle edit.details: Modal closes after save, changes persist

Authentication.details: Agency admin login works (admin-geneva@logirent.ch / LogiRent2024), upload/delete protected with 401

test_classes: TestVehicleNewFields - 4 tests (plate_number, chassis_number, color, all together)
TestVehicleDocumentUpload - 7 tests (all doc types + auth tests)

critical_code_review_comments: Object storage integration working correctly via Emergent integrations
Soft delete pattern implemented properly for documents (is_deleted flag)
All new fields properly defined in VehicleCreate model with Optional types
Frontend shows all new UI elements with proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing vehicles with documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle document upload feature fully implemented and working. Backend uses Emergent object storage for file uploads. Frontend vehicles page shows 4-column grid with plate badges and doc count badges. Edit modal has Identification section (plate, chassis, color) and Documents section with upload capability. BMW Series 3 vehicle has 7 documents for testing.
